enforced: rustfmt.toml controls formatting only (max_width, imports_granularity, group_imports)
clippy.toml controls lint tuning thresholds only (cognitive-complexity-threshold, too-many-arguments-threshold, type-complexity-threshold) — it cannot set lint levels

Lint LEVELS (e.g. clippy::all = "deny", clippy::pedantic = "warn") belong in the target project's own Cargo.toml under [lints.clippy] / [lints.rust] (stable since Rust 1.74); this baseline documents that requirement but does not create a Cargo.toml
note: This baseline intentionally ships no Cargo.toml. The target project's existing Cargo.toml must add a [lints] table to actually turn lints on; see 'enforced' above.
